title: Spicy Haddock Toast
description: A crowd-pleasing and crispy French dish featuring haddock on toast with a spicy kick, perfect for those looking for a paleo-friendly meal.
instructions: Season haddock fillets with salt and pepper on both sides.
Dip the haddock fillets in Panko breadcrumbs, ensuring they are fully coated.
Heat olive oil in a skillet over medium-high heat. Once hot, add haddock fillets and cook until golden brown, about 2-3 minutes per side.
Remove from heat and place on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Mix together red chili flakes, fresh dill, and garlic powder in a small bowl. Brush this mixture evenly over the top of each haddock fillet.
Bake for approximately 10-12 minutes or until crispy and golden brown.
